differential_diagnoses: Type A lactic acidosis due to cardiogenic/obstructive shock
next_steps: Obtain arterial blood gas and serum electrolytes to calculate anion gap and delta-delta
Measure serum lactate and beta-hydroxybutyrate levels
Perform immediate urinalysis with microscopy for infection and casts
Discontinue metformin and all other nephrotoxic agents
Obtain non-contrast head CT to rule out intracranial pathology
Initiate broad-spectrum empiric antibiotics after obtaining repeat blood and urine cultures
Evaluate for renal replacement therapy if severe acidosis or refractory MALA is present
